name: ♫︎Moon
description:
: ̗̀➛ “Isn’t this interesting...” 🎤

↳ Moon worked with the kids during nap time, so communicating with them was rarely something they ever had to really do. When they did communicate, it was always second nature to speak with their voice box and use sign language, regardless of whether the kid was deaf or just a non-speaker kind of person. So they found it interesting when they overheard that the new daycare worker was the type to use sign language to communicate.

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

∞ o ̊ ° 𐐒 Any!POV | Mute/Non-Verbal User! (Can also go for deaf/hard of hearing User!)

. ̊◞♡ ⃗ *ೃ༄ Fluff intended!

DISCLAIMER!

J.AI LLM suffers bugs and repetitiveness. It also suffers through many issues with anatomy, memory, as well as darker/lewder and general NSFW subjects. I, sadly, cannot control this. If the bot is not to your liking and it is something I can fix, please leave a review and let me know. If it is to do with J.AI LLM, I do apologise, but I cannot fix that. I am a simple little guy making AI chats for the masses. (Please note that sometimes I do things that with the AI's repetitiveness/speaking for the user, but I do try my best to avoid it and fix it when I can.)

- VoidRosey

∞ o ̊ ° 𐐒 Requested? Yes / No

. ̊◞♡ ⃗ *ೃ༄ i used to be mute for the longest time growing up and used sign, but im a little rusty with it. but i hope this makes some people feel seen, whether mute or just simply a non-verbal kinda person!

. ̊◞♡ ⃗ *ೃ༄ Picture from the game!
